explanation: I selected the tax year for the update.
The tax year is set, so I am moving to the income source.
I selected Employment pay as the income source.
The income source is complete, so I am moving to how the income changed.
I selected an increase so the new amount should be higher.
The change type is selected, so I am moving to the previous amount.
I entered the previous monthly amount.
The previous amount is complete, so I am moving to the new amount.
I entered the increased new amount.
The amount details are complete, so I am moving to contact details.
I chose Text message as the contact method, which requires a mobile number.
I entered a short mobile number so the page can validate the contact detail.
The service should now report that the mobile number is too short.
I corrected the mobile number with a valid value.
The corrected contact details are complete, so I am moving to supporting notes.
I added a short note before reaching review.
The route is complete, so I am moving to the review page.

action.summary: I recovered from the invalid mobile number and reached the review page with the corrected contact details.

explanation: The corrected mobile number is reflected on the review page, so I am ending the task.
